title: ₹1 lakh monthly salary plan: How much should go to SIP, FD, PPF and emergency fund?
summary: An effective financial blueprint should ideally include allocations to SIPs, fixed deposits, Public Provident Fund, and an&nbsp;emergency fund.

title: B-khata to A-khata: Bengaluru camps to offer on-the-spot help to property owners from 16 May
summary: Karnataka's Bhoo Guarantee 2026 scheme allows Bengaluru property owners to convert B-Khata to A-Khata with a 60% fee reduction. Full details here.

title: Marginal relief in income tax explained: Who it applies to and how it works under new vs old tax regime
summary: Marginal relief helps those earning slightly above a certain tax limit, making the tax burden more manageable under both the old and new tax regimes and ensuring fair taxation across all income levels. Full details here.&nbsp;

title: ₹30 lakh CTC breakdown: How much in-hand salary can you actually get?
summary: The elements of the wage framework include Base Salary, House Rent Allowance, Leave Travel Allowance, Special Allowance, Performance Bonus, Employee Provident Fund, and Income Tax.

title: Gift tax rules explained: Who can give you money or assets without tax implications?
summary: Gifts exceeding ₹50,000 are taxable under the Income Tax Act as income from other sources. Exemptions apply for gifts from relatives or on special occasions. Full list of exemptions here.

title: You can earn up to ₹69,000 monthly income from ₹1 crore FD in small finance banks. Here's how
summary: Small finance bank FDs can help deliver attractive monthly income on ₹1 crore deposits, with senior citizens earning higher returns through competitive fixed deposit interest rates.

title: Buying or selling property in India as an NRI? Here are the rules you should know
summary: Non-Resident Indians can buy property in India under FEMA and RBI regulations. They may purchase residential and commercial properties, but agricultural land is subject to restrictions.&nbsp;

title: Domestic travellers can now buy annual travel insurance for frequent trips: What's included, how it works and more
summary: The domestic travel insurance policy provides protection against several travel-specific risks and crises, including a personal injury benefit reaching ₹3 lakh and medical facility coverage up to ₹1 lakh during transit.

title: EPFO plans auto-settlement for final PF withdrawals. How will it benefit its 7 crore members?
summary: The EPFO auto-settlement facility aims to accelerate final PF withdrawals, reduce paperwork and streamline account transfers through a fully digital system for its more than seven crore members.

title: UPI's per-day and per-transaction limit set at ₹2 lakh in Europe. What it means for users
summary: The per-transaction and per-day limit for UPI Global Acceptance in Europe (peer-to-merchant) has now been increased to ₹2 lakh. Each member bank may set its own norms, subject to the overall applicable limits, NPCI has said.

title: US stocks today: Dow Jones crashes 500 points on mounting inflation worries
summary: U.S. stocks pulled back from record highs as rising crude oil prices and surging Treasury yields triggered fresh inflation concerns. The selloff hit AI-driven tech stocks hardest, while markets reassessed rate hike risks under incoming Fed leadership, with geopolitical tensions and bond market signa

title: SpaceX accelerates IPO timeline, targets June 11 pricing on Nasdaq
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is accelerating its IPO plans, with pricing expected around June 11 and a potential market debut by June 12 on Nasdaq. The company has fast-tracked filings after a quicker SEC review, moving ahead of its earlier late June timeline as it eyes strong investor demand.

title: JSW Steel posts 13-fold rise in profit for March quarter; to double capacity in 6 years
summary: JSW Steel reported a nearly 13-fold surge in Q4 profit driven by an exceptional gain and record volumes. The company plans aggressive expansion, targeting 78 million tonne capacity by FY32, supported by JVs, higher capex and strong domestic steel demand growth outlook.

title: SAIL Q4 Results: Cons PAT surges 47% YoY to Rs 1,835 crore, revenue rises 5%
summary: SAIL reported a strong Q4FY26 performance with net profit rising 47% year on year and revenue growing 5%. Sequential profit surged sharply, EBITDA improved significantly, and the board recommended a dividend of Rs 2.35 per share despite mixed global steel production trends and output softness.

title: Sebi, CBDT ease PAN rules for foreign investors after onboarding concerns
summary: Sebi and CBDT relaxed PAN compliance requirements for foreign portfolio investors after concerns over complex onboarding rules.
